stemHtml: A controller instructs an aircraft call sign BIGJET 347 to transfer communication to another aeronautical station upon reaching a specified level. Which of the following phraseology is in accordance with agreed procedures?

options.a: BIGJET 347 when reaching FL120 contact Donlon Control 119.725.
options.b: BIGJET 347 contact Donlon on 119.725 upon reaching FL120, Donlon Control.
options.c: BIGJET 347 when flying at Level 120 contact Donlon on 119.725.
options.d: BIGJET 347 at FL120 call Donlon Centre on 119.725.
